Functions for initializing the display, showing boot splash, error codes, and firmware update progress.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions for managing display operations, likely for an embedded system such as a watch. The [`display_init`](<#display_init>) function initializes the display hardware. The [`display_boot_splash`](<#display_boot_splash>) function shows a splash screen during the boot process. The [`display_error_code`](<#display_error_code>) function displays error codes, taking a `uint32_t` parameter to specify the error. The [`display_prepare_for_reset`](<#display_prepare_for_reset>) function is used to prevent visual artifacts when the system resets. The [`display_firmware_update_progress`](<#display_firmware_update_progress>) function shows the progress of a firmware update, using two `uint32_t` parameters to represent the progress as a fraction.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
